CREATE TABLE calculations (id INT, radius DOUBLE);
SELECT id, (2 * pi() * radius) AS circumference FROM calculations;
CREATE TABLE shapes (name VARCHAR(50), area DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO shapes VALUES ('Circle', pi() * POWER(3, 2));
SELECT name, area FROM shapes WHERE area > 25.0;
SELECT c.id, c.radius, (pi() * POWER(c.radius, 2)) AS area FROM calculations c WHERE c.id IN (SELECT id FROM calculations WHERE radius > 5.0);
CREATE TABLE area_results AS SELECT c.id, (pi() * POWER(c.radius, 2)) AS area FROM calculations c;
